content.en:
"Start cultivating!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend the Time Holy Technique-Eternal Holy Technique!

The Eternal Holy Technique is currently in the Consummation Realm, but because it is relatively difficult to cultivate, it is only in the Consummation Realm so far, and there is still a long way to go from the Extreme Realm, and Ye Tian rarely comprehends the Time Divine Technique.

But now it's different, in the realm of time, Ye Tian's speed of comprehension is not slow, although it is far from being as good as the effect of using the Ancestor Method and using the Ancestral Sacred Relics to comprehend the Holy Technique.

But the key is that this is the realm of time, where the endless years are contemplated, and the outside world has only passed for a moment.

Of course, the premise of everything is that you can keep going, otherwise you must find yourself to leave before you are completely assimilated by time.

At this time, Ye Tian could feel that his body was being affected by the power of time here, and his physical body was being wiped out by the power of time little by little.

Ye Tian was thinking about a question, his replica body was assimilated here, and the body should be fine, does that mean that he can enter here again and again?

After all, the clones of other domain ancestors can't enter the realm of time, and once they enter, they will be isolated from the main body in time and space, and they will automatically dissipate, and the clones can't cultivate.

But Ye Tian's copy body is equivalent to the main body, which means that Ye Tian can enter the realm of time again and again.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't dare to really try, after all, he didn't know much about the realm of time, in case the realm of time could ignore the difference between the ontology and the copying body, and pull his ontology into the time to assimilate, then he would really fall.

He didn't dare to do such a risky thing.

Time passed slowly, and for him, who had an infinite lifespan, time here had no meaning.

Moreover, the soul that replicates the body is in a very strange state, able to connect with the essence, but this connection seems to be frozen, because the time of the outside world is imprisoned for him.

No matter how many years he cultivated here, time in the outside world would never pass.

As a result, he has no way to communicate with the ontology.

Millions of years!

Ten million years!

100 million years!

Since Ye Tian didn't have a time-type ancestor method, he naturally couldn't quickly comprehend the Time Sacred Technique, even if the Time Realm was suitable for comprehending the Time Sacred Technique, the effect of the improvement would only increase tenfold.

But originally, if Ye Tian wanted to cultivate a time saint technique to the extreme realm, it would take at least tens of billions of years.

This is the time it takes without the help of any resources and treasures, otherwise, many domain ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain would have already cultivated a holy technique to the extreme realm, but in fact, even if there is no superior domain ancestor, it is difficult to cultivate a holy technique to the extreme realm, and it is useless to cultivate for trillions of years.

In the blink of an eye, more than three billion years have passed.

It could be said that this was also the first time that Ye Tian had retreated for such a long time, but for many Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, billions of years were not too long.

At this time.

Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Eternal Saint Technique to the limit.

"The Eternal Sacred Technique has reached the limit realm, it's time to comprehend the other Sacred Techniques!"

Ye Tian muttered.

"First comprehend the Imperial Body Holy Technique, this Holy Skill can increase the overall strength and increase other Holy Skills, which is the most useful!"

Ye Tian also didn't know how many holy techniques he could cultivate to the limit here, so he had to maximize his benefits, so it was the most cost-effective thing to comprehend the Imperial Body Saint Technique first.

However, the comprehension effect of the Imperial Body Holy Technique here is not as good as that of the outside world, and there is no treasure to increase the cultivation, so the time it takes is even longer than that of the Eternal Holy Technique.

But time is just a number for Ye Tian, so he doesn't care how much time it takes.

A billion years have passed!

Ten billion years have passed!

If Ye Tian didn't know too much about the way of time, otherwise he wouldn't be able to remember how much time had passed with the passage of time.

A full 300 billion years have passed, and Ye Tiancai has finally cultivated the Imperial Body Saint Technique to the extreme realm.

You must know that he is a Holy Endower, and it took him so long to cultivate a Holy Skill to the extreme realm, even if other Holy Endowed people spend some treasure resources or treasure places that help to comprehend the Holy Skill to cultivate the Holy Skill, it will take at least tens of billions of years to cultivate a Holy Skill to the extreme realm.

But in fact, how many saint-endowed people would be willing to spend such a long time contemplating a holy skill?

As for other non-saint endowments, without the existence of saint endowments, I am afraid that for countless trillions of years, they will not be able to cultivate a holy technique to the extreme realm, and they will not even be able to cultivate it to the Dacheng realm, which is also the sadness of ordinary cultivators.

This is also the reason why so many Supreme Domain Ancestors have to spend endless years and also want to elevate their souls to the Holy Soul level.

Because once the Holy Soul is promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, a Natal Divine Endowment can be born, and it will be on an equal footing with the Holy Endowment.

Without the Holy Endowment, the gap between each other is too great!

After 300 billion years of penance, Ye Tiandu almost collapsed.

In desperation, he could only cast an illusion to create an illusion world, so that he could relax for a while and calm his mind.

Otherwise, if you continue to practice so hard, no matter how tenacious your state of mind is, you may not be able to stabilize it.

"Although the cultivation of the Time Realm is good, it takes too long, and if the Dao heart is unstable, I am afraid that I will go crazy, and I will go out a long time ago!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Afterwards, Ye Tian took a look at his body, which had been eroded by one percent by the Time Realm.

In other words, he can still cultivate for a long time.

In fact, once the erosion reaches the level of 50%, it is very dangerous, and it may be assimilated by the realm of time at any time.

Therefore, a person who has entered the realm of time must come out when his body has been eroded by time by 49 percent, and he should not be greedy to continue cultivating, otherwise it is easy for something to happen.

Once assimilated, it's an instantaneous thing, and it's too late to come out at all.

After cultivating the Imperial Body Sacred Technique to the extreme realm, Ye Tian began to cultivate other Sacred Techniques, such as the Holy Armor Holy Technique, the Suppression Divine Technique, the Immortal Sacred Technique, and so on.

With the passage of time in units of 100 million years, Ye Tian's Sect Saint Technique was improving.

Holy Armor Holy Technique, Extreme Realm!

Zhen Shen Technique, Extreme Realm!

Immortal Holy Technique, Extreme Realm!

With the cultivation of a holy technique to the extreme realm, Ye Tian had already cultivated in the realm of time for more than a trillion years, and such a long time was an astronomical amount that he did not dare to imagine in the past.

"It seems that I have the hope of cultivating all the holy skills here to the limit!"

Ye Tian muttered.
